adapters.label: GitHub Copilot CLI
adapters.install_hint: npm install -g @github/copilot (or `brew install copilot-cli`), then run `copilot login` and ensure `copilot` is on PATH.
adapters.description: GitHub Copilot CLI adapter. One-shot via `-s -p`, interactive via `-i`, JSONL streaming via `--output-format json --stream on`, session pre-assignment/resume via `--session-id`/`--resume`. Permission mapping uses the argv-list sandbox form because Copilot's flags are boolean/repeatable (`--allow-all`; `--deny-tool write --deny-tool shell`) rather than a single `--flag value` pair.
